elements.label: Artificial Intelligence
elements.description: The broad field of creating systems that can perceive, learn, reason, plan, communicate, generate, decide, or act in ways associated with intelligence.

elements.label: Symbolic AI
elements.description: AI based on explicit symbols, rules, logic, and structured knowledge.

elements.label: Machine Learning
elements.description: AI systems that learn patterns from data rather than relying only on hand-written rules.

elements.label: Search, Planning and Optimization
elements.description: Methods for finding good actions, paths, plans, or solutions across possible states.

elements.label: Knowledge and Reasoning
elements.description: Methods for representing facts, uncertainty, causality, explanations, and inference.

elements.label: Robotics and Embodied AI
elements.description: AI systems that perceive, act, and learn in physical or embodied environments.

elements.label: Natural Language and Speech
elements.description: AI for understanding, generating, translating, retrieving, and speaking human language.

elements.label: Computer Vision and Perception
elements.description: AI for interpreting images, video, scenes, objects, and sensory information.

elements.label: Generative AI
elements.description: AI systems and methods that generate new text, images, audio, video, code, data, or other artifacts.

elements.label: Foundation Models and General-Purpose AI
elements.description: Large, broadly trained models and systems that can be adapted to many downstream tasks.

elements.label: Agentic and Multi-Agent Systems
elements.description: AI systems involving autonomous agents and multiple interacting agents.

elements.label: Human-AI Interaction
elements.description: Human interaction with AI systems.

elements.label: AI Safety, Alignment and Governance
elements.description: Cross-cutting work on making AI reliable, controllable, fair, secure, and socially governed.

elements.label: AGI and Future AI
elements.description: Future-facing ideas about general intelligence, self-improving systems, and long-term AI trajectories.

elements.label: Rule-Based Systems
